boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action for partial delivery
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact action boundary for partial delivery
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Receipt quantity dependency open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: receipt quantity must cover invoice line

critical_features_preserved: receipt quantity must cover invoice line
final_answer: The controlling record does not close the exact action boundary. The receipt quantity must cover the invoice line before payment, invoice release, or vendor-master execution may proceed. Vendor history and urgent tone do not override source-control records. Escalation is required until the receipt dependency is resolved in the source records.
open_blockers: receipt quantity must cover invoice line
